productDisplayName: Reebok Men Buckets VI Black Sports Shoes
description: The perfect shoes for Basketball enthusiasts are here! reebok Buckets VI combine their light weight with striking looks and DMX Ride cushioning system to give you maximum comfort and style on the court. The outsole is durable and provides great traction on all surfaces, so you can be more confident when playing. Can also be used for casual wear. Go slam dunk! Upper Soft leather upper for added durability and style Synthetic overlays for better shoe structure and durability Mid-cut design for ankle support and lateral stability Perforated pattern on forefoot and midfoot for style Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Lushly padded tongue and well-cushioned collar for in-step comfort Mesh tongue for better ventilation Brand name on forefoot and lateral side Midsole Injection moulded EVA midsole for lightweight responsive cushioning and shock absorption DMX Ride foam cushioning for all-day comfort Mesh lining for increased ventilation and comfort Removable sockliner to replace with an orthotic Outsole Non marking high abrasion rubber outsole for better shock absorption and durability Circular grooves for improved traction Pivot point enables 180 degree movement Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash Do not store in direct sunlight
